pre_health_command.name: docker
pre_health_command.command: bash -c 'cd /home/user_a/projects/sandbox/ && [ -f .env ] && source .env; PORT=${LLM_PORT:-8080}; CTX=${LLM_CTX_SIZE:-8192}; MAX=${LLM_MAX_GENERATION:-2048}; GPU=${LLM_GPU_LAYERS:-25}; BATCH=${LLM_BATCH_SIZE:-512}; PAR=${LLM_PARALLEL:-1}; DEF=${LLM_DEFRAG_THOLD:-0.1}; FA=${LLM_FLASH_ATTENTION:-on}; MOD=$(basename "${LLM_MODEL}"); [[ "$MOD" != *.gguf ]] && MOD="${MOD}.gguf"; docker rm -f recur-llama-daemon 2>/dev/null; exec docker run --rm --name recur-llama-daemon --gpus all -v /home/user_a/llama/models:/models --cap-add IPC_LOCK -p $PORT:$PORT ghcr.io/ggml-org/llama.cpp:server-cuda -m "/models/$MOD" --port $PORT --host 0.0.0.0 -c $CTX -n $MAX --n-gpu-layers $GPU --batch-size $BATCH --parallel $PAR --defrag-thold $DEF -fa $FA --cache-type-k q8_0 --cache-type-v q8_0 --numa distribute --threads 6 --ubatch-size $BATCH --no-mmap --mlock'
